en: Excuse me, ma'am.
Are you okay?
Yeah.
Do they just put you on the spot like that, like all the time?
ko: 그들이 항상 그렇게 당신을 곤란하게 하나요?

en: The professors? Yeah, they tend to do that.
Socratic method.
So if you don't know the answers, they're just going to kick you out.
ko: 그래서 답을 모르면 그냥 쫓아내는 거군요.

en: So you have Stromwell, huh?
Yes. Did she do that to you, too?
No. But she did make me cry once. I mean, not in class.
ko: 아니요. 하지만 한 번 울게 만들었어요. 수업 중은 아니었지만요.

en: I waited until I got back to my room.
But yeah, she'll kick you right in the ball.
ko: 하지만 네, 그녀는 정말 강하게 다가와요.

en: Yeah, or wherever, you know.
But yeah, she's tough. Really tough.
All right.
Don't worry, though. It gets better. Who else do you have?
ko: 걱정하지 마세요. 나아질 거예요. 다른 교수님은 누구세요?

en: I have Callahan, Royalton, and Leventhal.
Yeah. See, speak up in Callahan's class.
He really likes people that are opinionated. Okay.
ko: 그는 의견이 뚜렷한 사람을 정말 좋아해요. 알겠죠?

en: And in Royalton's class, uh...
